android.widget.TextView.text: Comedian Chris Rock narrates the hilarious, touching story of a teenager growing up as the eldest of three children in Brooklyn during the 1980s.
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: Stay in the loop when new content drops
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: Chris struggles to find his place while keeping his siblings in line at home and dealing with the school bully.
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: When Chris's mother, Rochelle, hires the girl next door, Keisha, to tutor Drew at math, Chris sees this as an ideal chance to impress her.
android.widget.TextView.heading: false
